top_categories.workout_context: 160 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
160 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Race-pace efforts that mimic RAIN - Ride Across Indiana's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 160 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 3,000ft of climbing on flat to gently rolling paved roads across Indiana does to your power file on race day.
When someone attacks on flat to gently rolling paved roads across Indiana, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
RAIN - Ride Across Indiana's flat to gently rolling paved roads across Indiana forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 160 miles.
RAIN - Ride Across Indiana's flat to gently rolling paved roads across Indiana rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Tempo is RAIN - Ride Across Indiana's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 160 miles on flat to gently rolling paved roads across Indiana. Train it until it's automatic.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of RAIN - Ride Across Indiana. Train it until it feels boring.
At RAIN - Ride Across Indiana, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on flat to gently rolling paved roads across Indiana. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 160 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 160 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, HVLI Extended, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 160 miles of flat to gently rolling paved roads across indiana farmland in Terre Haute to Richmond, Indiana, USA.
